source venv/bin/activate
pip install spotipy ytmusicapi rapidfuzz

alright, thank you, that'll be all for now, i'll make changes when i remember

the dashboard displaying date, weather of the user's location, local news report, local dollar exchange rate, although i didn't start it on this system i did start them on my gemini cli account

please give a step by step guide on how to launch all our completed projects
